    @allure.title("PATCH /api/v1/account/user/update/phone/ - invalid auth token returns 401")
    @allure.severity(allure.severity_level.CRITICAL)
    def test_update_phone_invalid_auth_returns_401(self):
        """
        Purpose: Verify that request with invalid Bearer token returns 401
        Doc error: 401 not_authenticated
        """
        with allure.step("Send PATCH request with invalid Bearer token"):
            headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer invalidtoken12345"}
            response = requests.patch(
                PHONE_URL,
                json={"verification_token": "anytoken"},
                headers=headers
            )
    
        with allure.step("Verify status code is 401"):
            assert response.status_code == 401, \
                f"Expected: 401, Got: {response.status_code} | {response.text}"
    
        with allure.step("Verify message_key is not_authenticated"):
            data = response.json()
>           assert data.get("message_key") == "not_authenticated" or \
                   "not_authenticated" in str(data.get("detail", "")), \
                f"Expected 'not_authenticated' message_key, Got: {data}"
